title: Forecast report using a formula column
excerpt: I am trying to use a formula which looks at the total deal value and uses an associated % to formulate the estimated deal value based on the stage the deal is at. However in the dashboard when I chose to have the months …

posts.author: lilystevens (Lily)
posts.cookedHtml: I am trying to use a formula which looks at the total deal value and uses an associated % to formulate the estimated deal value based on the stage the deal is at. However in the dashboard when I chose to have the months from the expected close date along the x-axis and the formula column ‘expected deal value’ on the y it is not showing any data does anyone know how to resolve this?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Lily,

Sorry you’re running into some issues here.

Would you be able to share a screenshot of what you’re seeing on your end? If possible, a screenshot of your board with the specific columns and the error in the dashboard, would be great, just so I can take a closer look

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thank you for sharing lily… hmm this looks a little strange…

Would you be able to share a screenshot of the columns in your board? From what I can see this isn’t a mirror column, so I’d like to take a look at the columns to rule out any other issues. Thanks for your help
